title: The After-Death Encounter
description: The central meeting after death — always an encounter with one's own totality. Tibetan: 42 Peaceful and 58 Wrathful Deities. Egyptian: the Re-Osiris union at midnight. Steiner: the Guardian of the Threshold. Tantraloka: Bhairava. Daimon path: the Holy Guardian Angel. All traditions agree this encounter is simultaneously terrifying and liberating, depending on whether the soul recognizes itself.
